channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Who's No. 1? No. 2 UConn, No. 5 UCLA and No. 6 Notre Dame all have chance at top spot in AP poll
item.description: A wild weekend in Los Angeles set up for a new No. 1 in The Associated Press women’s basketball poll when it’s released Monday.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks advances to the next round
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: All-Stars Paul George and Joel Embiid both missed Sunday's game against the Los Angeles Clippers with knee injuries.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina experiences rare sting of defeat, seeing 43-game winning streak end
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Top-ranked South Carolina felt something it hasn't known in over 2 1/2 years. The sting of defeat after being thoroughly dominated in a 77-62 loss to No. 5 UCLA on Sunday. Gone was the overall 43-game winning streak. Done was the run of 33 consecutive road victories. And the No.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vikings win on walk-off field goal in overtime after blowing late lead, allowing onside kick recovery
item.description: The Vikings squandered a two-touchdown lead in the fourth and allowed an onside kick recovery, but they got the job done with a walk-off field goal in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jannik Sinner's 2024: 2 Slam Grand titles, a doping case and a Davis Cup title for Italy
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Jannik Sinner was in the locker room, getting ready to go on court and try to win a match that would give Italy its second Davis Cup title in a row, when his teammate, Matteo Berrettini, was asked about being so close to a championship.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rico Carty, former Braves star and 1970 NL batting champ, dead at 85
item.description: Atlanta Braves outfielder Rico Carty, who won a batting title and was an All-Star during his career, has died, the team and players' association said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Verstappen still manages to win 4th straight F1 title in one of worst seasons of his Red Bull career
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Max Verstappen won an unbelievable 19 races last season that included an incredible streak of 10 in a row in what would arguably go down as one of the greatest years in Formula 1 history.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Max Verstappen wins 4th straight F1 world championship as George Russell wins Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: Max Verstappen finished in fifth place at the Las Vegas Grand Prix and it was enough to capture the fourth consecutive F1 world championship of his career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Auburn wins 43-41, four-OT thriller over playoff hopeful No. 15 Texas A&M
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Auburn fans finally had a big win to celebrate. Texas A&M, and perhaps the Southeastern Conference, not so much. Payton Thorne hit KeAndre Lambert-Smith for a two-point play in the fourth overtime to lift the Tigers to a 43-41 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC busts out of offensive slump with 6-1 victory
item.description: PITTSBURGH (ABC4 Sports) - After getting shut out for the fifth time of the season, the Utah Hockey team scored a regulation-time season-high six goals in a 6-1 rout over the Pittsburgh Penguins Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Princely Umanmielen’s return to the Swamp ends with a loss and a police escort
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Princely Umanmielen's return to the Swamp ended with a police escort. Umanmielen, who spent three years at Florida before transferring to Ole Miss, left the stadium with a number of officers surrounding him. And the defensive end still tried to get at heckling fans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Cam Skattebo was the workhorse once again for Arizona State, carrying the Sun Devils on his back by rushing for 147 yards and three touchdowns. His reward was a well-earned celebration with fans. Twice. Skattebo had another big game, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU sweeps men's and women's cross-country national titles
item.description: WACO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU became just the fifth school ever to win national titles in both men's and women's cross-country. The #1 ranked women's team won its sixth in program history, with a team score of 147 at the Zimmer Championship Course Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: 2024 F1 Las Vegas Grand Prix preview: Racing down the Strip
item.description: The 2024 Formula 1 World Championship heads to Las Vegas this weekend for what will be the third to last race of the season.
item.dc:creator: Viknesh Vijayenthiran - Motor Authority, Fox 5

item.title: Crimson Cliffs pulls off miraculous comeback to win 4A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was simply one of the best, most dramatic games in Utah high school football championship game history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
